message:
🐛 Replace raw button elements with shared Button component in UI files (#2527)

Converts 25 raw <button> elements across 10 shared UI component files
to use the shared Button component, ensuring consistent styling, focus
states, and accessibility patterns.

Files updated:
- StatsConfig.tsx (9 conversions)
- CardControls.tsx (3 conversions)
- Pagination.tsx (4 conversions)
- StatsOverview.tsx (2 conversions)
- Toast.tsx (1 conversion)
- CollapsibleSection.tsx (1 conversion)
- CodeBlock.tsx (1 conversion)
- FeatureHintTooltip.tsx (1 conversion)
- RefreshIndicator.tsx (1 conversion)
- CardSearch.tsx (1 conversion)

Remaining raw buttons are justified exceptions: dnd-kit drag handles
(require spreading {...attributes, ...listeners}) and dropdown menu
option items (require full-width text-left layout).

Partially addresses #2323

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
